subject: Chef removal changes for openecomp-be module.
commit_message:
Chef removal changes for openecomp-be module.

- Removed chef from openecomp-be module with Kubernetes Resources.

Issue-ID: SDC-4698
Change-Id: Iaa4b6ed9b91d0d96b569862d705f60cb982f0404
Signed-off-by: rohit.raj@t-systems.com <rohit.raj@t-systems.com>
